utterance: write evals for this skill and grade the outputs

assertions.text: the agent should read skills/evaluating-skills/SKILL.md before authoring evals; the skill defines the 8-stage loop
the agent should follow the 8-stage loop (capture intent -> write evals.json -> run with+without -> grade -> aggregate -> review -> iterate -> optimize) per the skill, not a single-pass sketch
each eval's assertions should sum to 100 per category (instruction_following and goal_completion) per the Tessl rubric schema
the produced evals.json should validate against the marketplace's evals schema (eval_id, expected_skill, utterance, assertions[] with required fields)
the agent should produce both with-skill and without-skill grades for each eval, enabling delta calculation per the Tessl/SkillsBench methodology

reference_solution: Agent reads evaluating-skills/SKILL.md, authors ≥5 evals with 5 assertions each (IF sum=100, GC sum=100), runs both with-skill and without-skill configurations, grades per the Tessl schema, reports per-eval deltas.
